creator: gael.roualland@dial.oleane.com
text:
Loading alias_irc in a kernel with nat activated leads to a kernel crash
with a  double panic a few seconds later when at least one irc connection
is active to the outside (locally originated).

Unfortunately I do not have a backtrace available, core dump was lost.
I will reproduce if needed to get it.

How-To-Repeat: # kldload alias_irc

then let pass some irc traffic...
